---
name: Refactoring / Code quality
about: Suggest code cleanups, technical debt resolution, or library upgrades.
title: '[REFACTOR] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description of Current Code
A clear description of the current implementation, file(s) involved, or behavior that needs improvement.

## Proposed Improvement
Describe the changes or refactoring steps you recommend. If applicable, specify the libraries, patterns, or architecture to be adopted.

## Rationale
Why should we refactor this? (e.g., performance improvement, readability, test coverage, reduction of technical debt).

## Potential Impact / Risks
Are there any potential breaking changes, side effects, or impact on existing functionality?

## Assign / Tag Staff
Please tag the project's response team / staff below:

- Staff: @meadoge
- Staff: @hwangswan
